Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Rojric]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — Rojric is Calder's father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — Rojric is a Marten.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — Rojric is missing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 10''' — Rojric was taken.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — Rojric Marten is a resident of the Candle Bay Imperial Prison and Reformative Facility.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 15''' — Rojric Marten is Calder's father and a prisoner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — Rojric Marten is held in a cell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Rojric Marten has pale skin and red Izyrian hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — Rojric Marten died with an audible shriek that seemed to tear the world in half.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — Rojric Marten was killed on the Emperor's orders.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
